en_title: Marvel's Wolverine: Who's Who In the State of Play Trailer
cn_title: 《漫威金刚狼》State of Play预告角色解析
subtitle: 狼群集结
opus_summary: 在索尼State of Play发布会上，《漫威金刚狼》放出全新实机预告，展示了金刚狼的狂暴战斗与丰富角色阵容。游戏将于9月15日发售，由Insomniac开发。预告中出现了掠夺者、Trask Industries等敌对势力，以及X战警成员琴·格雷、Morlocks等角色，还有经典棕色战衣等可解锁服装。

paragraphs.en: Superhero fans got a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine at the latest Sony State of Play. If there’s one takeaway from this new gameplay footage, it’s that Logan is going to shed a lot of blood over the course of his latest gaming adventure. But if there’s another takeaway, it’s that the game is digging deep into X-Men lore and drawing on that vast lineup that is Wolverine’s supporting cast.
paragraphs.cn: 在索尼State of Play发布会上，超级英雄粉丝们得以近距离一睹《漫威金刚狼》的风采。如果说这段新实机演示有一个核心看点，那就是罗根将在这次游戏冒险中血流成河。但如果说还有另一个看点，那就是游戏深入挖掘了X战警的传说，并动用了金刚狼庞大的配角阵容。

paragraphs.en: As we wait for the September 15 release of Marvel’s Wolverine, let’s break down all the characters we meet in this new footage and how they fit into Logan’s colorful, extremely violent world.
paragraphs.cn: 在等待《漫威金刚狼》9月15日发售之际，让我们来解析一下这段新预告中出现的所有角色，以及他们如何融入罗根那个多彩而极度暴力的世界。

paragraphs.en: Naturally, we have to start with Mr. James Howlett himself. Marvel’s Wolverine marks the first time since 2009’s X-Men Origins: Wolverine that we’re getting a AAA game built solely around the Ol’ Canucklehead. And, in many ways, Insomniac’s new game looks to be the spiritual sequel to that classic Activision title. Both games really lean into the carnage and bloodshed that comes from having a playable character with razor-sharp, unbreakable claws and a nearly limitless healing factor.
paragraphs.cn: 自然，我们得从詹姆斯·豪利特先生本人开始。《漫威金刚狼》是自2009年《X战警前传：金刚狼》以来，第一款完全围绕这位老加拿大人打造的3A级游戏。而且在很多方面，Insomniac的新作看起来就像是那款经典Activision游戏的精神续作。两款游戏都毫不避讳地展现了可操作角色拥有锋利无比、坚不可摧的利爪和近乎无限的自愈能力所带来的杀戮与流血。

paragraphs.en: Like X-Men Origins: Wolverine, we have gameplay elements like Logan showing real-time damage from his battles and relying on his healing factor. There’s also a berserker rage mechanic that can be activated as Logan racks up kills. Also like Origins, players can close the distance between themselves and their prey by leaping through the air and impaling foes. He may not be quite as nimble as Spider-Man, but Wolverine still gets around the map pretty quickly.
paragraphs.cn: 与《X战警前传：金刚狼》类似，游戏包含罗根实时显示战斗损伤并依赖自愈因子的玩法元素。还有一个狂战士之怒机制，可以在罗根累积击杀后激活。同样与《前传》相似，玩家可以通过空中跳跃刺穿敌人来拉近与猎物之间的距离。他可能不如蜘蛛侠那么敏捷，但金刚狼在地图上移动的速度依然相当快。

paragraphs.en: Story-wise, we’re not sure what point in the game this segment is taking place, but we do learn that Logan is on the trail of a group of mutants who have been kidnapped by the Reavers (more on said mutants and the Reavers themselves in a bit). It seems mutants are an especially endangered species in this particular version of the Marvel Universe, but it’s a good thing they have Logan watching their backs.
paragraphs.cn: 从剧情上看，我们不确定这段演示发生在游戏的哪个阶段，但我们得知罗根正在追踪一群被掠夺者绑架的变种人（稍后会详细介绍这些变种人和掠夺者本身）。在这个特定版本的漫威宇宙中，变种人似乎是一种特别濒危的物种，但好在有罗根在背后保护他们。

paragraphs.en: Naturally, this story thread looks to be one piece of a much larger puzzle. We see enough characters in the gameplay footage and the sizzle reel that follows to know that the game is drawing on many of Wolverine’s most iconic foes. In terms of scope and cast, Marvel’s Wolverine looks to easily rival the Spider-Man games.
paragraphs.cn: 自然，这条故事线看起来只是更大谜题的一部分。我们在实机演示和随后的精彩集锦中看到了足够多的角色，足以知道游戏动用了金刚狼许多最具代表性的敌人。就规模和阵容而言，《漫威金刚狼》看起来毫不逊色于《蜘蛛侠》系列游戏。

paragraphs.en: The sizzle reel also teases some of the many unlockable costumes we’ll see in the game. There are multiple civilian outfits for Logan, including the red plaid shirt with cowboy hat we saw in the original teaser and one with a fur-lined jacket. We also see Logan’s iconic Patch disguise that he wears while gambling his days away in seedy Madripoor. And, perhaps most excitingly, we see a version of the classic brown and tan Wolverine costume that looks to be taken specifically from 2024’s Deadpool & Wolverine. That basically confirms that we’ll see a bunch of the popular movie suits as unlockable costumes in the game.
paragraphs.cn: 精彩集锦还预告了游戏中许多可解锁的服装。罗根有多套便服，包括最初预告片中出现的红色格子衬衫配牛仔帽，以及一件毛领夹克。我们还看到了罗根标志性的「眼罩」伪装，他在肮脏的马德里坡港终日赌博时就穿着这身。而最令人兴奋的或许是，我们看到了一款经典的棕色和棕褐色金刚狼战衣，看起来特别取自2024年的《死侍与金刚狼》。这基本上证实了我们将看到一系列热门电影服装作为游戏中的可解锁服装。

paragraphs.en: Like the Spider-Man games, Marvel’s Wolverine will feature several factions of enemies that Logan will clash with repeatedly over the course of his new adventure. One of those is the Reavers. These elite mercenaries are decked out with the finest cybernetic enhancements money can buy. Clearly, though, that only helps so much when it comes to tussling with Wolverine.
paragraphs.cn: 与《蜘蛛侠》系列游戏类似，《漫威金刚狼》将包含多个敌对派系，罗根将在新冒险中反复与他们交锋。其中之一就是掠夺者。这些精英雇佣兵配备了金钱能买到的最好的机械增强装置。不过，显然这在与金刚狼搏斗时也只能帮到有限的程度。

paragraphs.en: In the comics, the Reavers were introduced in 1988’s Uncanny X-Men #229, during a period when the X-Men were believed dead and hiding out in Australia. In one of their first clashes with the X-Men, they actually captured and crucified Wolverine (a memorable image that was further immortalized in Deadpool & Wolverine).
paragraphs.cn: 在漫画中，掠夺者首次登场于1988年的《非凡X战警》第229期，当时X战警被认为已经死亡并藏匿在澳大利亚。在他们与X战警的首次冲突中，他们实际上抓住了金刚狼并将其钉在十字架上（这个令人难忘的画面在《死侍与金刚狼》中得到了进一步的不朽呈现）。

paragraphs.en: The group was originally spearheaded by former Hellfire Club member Donald Pierce, though they’ve also become closely associated with Lady Deathstrike. It remains to be seen if either Pierce or Deathstrike will appear in the game, though the latter seems like a safe inclusion.
paragraphs.cn: 该组织最初由前地狱火俱乐部成员唐纳德·皮尔斯领导，不过他们也与死亡女关系密切。皮尔斯或死亡女是否会在游戏中出现还有待观察，不过后者似乎很有可能会登场。

paragraphs.en: The only named Reaver we meet in the trailer is Skullbuster, but we’re sure others like Bonebreaker and Pretty Boy will be showing up too.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片中我们遇到的唯一有名有姓的掠夺者是碎颅者，但我们确信像碎骨者和漂亮男孩这样的其他角色也会出现。

paragraphs.en: In the gameplay footage, we can see a cargo container with the logo “Trask Industries” printed on it. That company is named for Bolivar Trask, the inventor of the mutant-hunting robots known as Sentinels. Later, the sizzle reel shows a Sentinel in action, though this particular variant appears to be human-sized.
paragraphs.cn: 在实机演示中，我们可以看到印有「Trask Industries」标志的货柜。这家公司以玻利瓦尔·特拉斯克的名字命名，他是被称为哨兵的猎杀变种人机器人的发明者。随后，精彩集锦展示了一个哨兵在行动，不过这个特殊变体似乎是人类大小。

paragraphs.en: All signs point to Trask Industries being another of the main factions of enemies Logan will fight in the game. That includes both standard, gun-toting mercenaries and various incarnations of the Sentinels. The previous trailer did confirm we’ll meet a more traditional, oversized Sentinel at some point in the game.
paragraphs.cn: 所有迹象都表明，Trask Industries是罗根在游戏中将对抗的另一个主要敌对派系。这包括标准的持枪雇佣兵和哨兵的各种形态。之前的预告片确实证实了我们在游戏中的某个时刻会遇到一个更传统的、超大型的哨兵。

paragraphs.en: It appears that the Reavers were hired by Trask to kidnap the mutants Logan is trying to rescue. Perhaps the company is looking for more test subjects to help perfect its Sentinel program?
paragraphs.cn: 看来掠夺者是受Trask雇佣来绑架罗根试图营救的变种人的。也许这家公司正在寻找更多的测试对象来帮助完善其哨兵计划？

paragraphs.en: We see several familiar faces among the group of mutants Logan rescues in the gameplay footage. Chief among them is Leech, a young mutant with the ability to suppress the superhuman abilities of anyone around him (Leech was the inspiration for Cameron Bright’s character Jimmy in 2006’s X-Men: The Last Stand). Leech is a member of the Morlocks, a group of mutant outcasts who dwell in the sewers beneath New York City.
paragraphs.cn: 在实机演示中，罗根营救的变种人群体中有几张熟悉的面孔。其中最主要的是李奇，一个年轻的变种人，能够抑制周围任何人的超能力（李奇是2006年《X战警：背水一战》中卡梅隆·布莱特饰演的吉米的灵感来源）。李奇是Morlocks的成员，Morlocks是一群居住在地下下水道中的变种人流亡者。

paragraphs.en: Also on the Morlock front is what appears to be Callisto, played by none other than Jedi: Fallen Order's Debra Wilson. Callisto is the leader of the Morlocks and a woman with a deep connection to Logan's fellow X-Man Storm.
paragraphs.cn: 在Morlock方面，还有一个看起来像是卡利斯托的角色，由《星球大战绝地：陨落的武士团》的黛布拉·威尔逊饰演。卡利斯托是Morlocks的领袖，与罗根的X战警同伴暴风女有着深厚的联系。

paragraphs.en: We also see a character who appears to be Toad, a longtime member of Magneto’s Brotherhood of Evil Mutants. Toad has a long, prehensile tongue and a powerful kick, neither of which was enough to save him from the Reavers.
paragraphs.cn: 我们还看到了一个看起来像是蛤蟆的角色，他是万磁王邪恶变种人兄弟会的长期成员。蛤蟆有一条长长的、可卷曲的舌头和强力的踢击，但这些都不足以让他从掠夺者手中逃脱。

paragraphs.en: There’s another bald character in this group who may be Caliban. Caliban is a mutant who can sense other mutants over great distances, and is probably best remembered for his supporting role in 2017’s Logan (played by Stephen Merchant). Funnily enough, that movie also depicted Caliban being captured and exploited by the Reavers.
paragraphs.cn: 这群人中还有一个光头角色，可能是卡利班。卡利班是一个能够远距离感知其他变种人的变种人，他最令人印象深刻的可能是2017年《金刚狼3：殊死一战》中的配角（由斯蒂芬·麦钱特饰演）。有趣的是，那部电影也描绘了卡利班被掠夺者捕获和利用的情节。

paragraphs.en: Those are all the characters we were able to pick out, but let us know in the comments if you recognize any other mutants in this group of prisoners.
paragraphs.cn: 这些是我们能辨认出的所有角色，但如果你在这群囚犯中认出了其他变种人，请在评论中告诉我们。

paragraphs.en: Logan won’t be fighting this battle entirely alone. We see Jean Grey show up to lend a helping hand midway through the gameplay trailer. Jean, of course, is a founding member of the X-Men and a hugely powerful psychic. In most versions of the X-Men mythos, Logan is deeply infatuated with Jean, even though she usually has eyes only for Cyclops.
paragraphs.cn: 罗根不会完全孤军奋战。在实机预告的中段，我们看到琴·格雷出现并伸出援手。琴当然是X战警的创始成员，也是一位极其强大的心灵感应者。在大多数版本的X战警神话中，罗根对琴深深着迷，尽管她通常只钟情于镭射眼。

paragraphs.en: Jean stops by to assist Wolverine in his efforts to rescue the captured mutants, though at some point she seemingly gets left behind as Logan heads out onto the open road. It remains to be seen just how big a role she’ll play in the story, and how many other X-Men will stop by.
paragraphs.cn: 琴前来协助金刚狼营救被俘的变种人，但在某个时刻，她似乎被留在了后面，而罗根则踏上了开阔的道路。她在故事中究竟会扮演多大的角色，以及还有多少其他X战警会出现，仍有待观察。

paragraphs.en: That does raise an interesting question. Do the X-Men actually exist in this universe? We’re told that this is a very dark version of the Marvel Universe where mutants are hunted and most members of the general public don’t even know they exist. That would seem to suggest that Professor X and his team haven’t been out there campaigning for peaceful coexistence between humans and mutants. It’s worth noting that Jean isn’t even wearing a traditional X-Men uniform here.
paragraphs.cn: 这确实引出了一个有趣的问题。X战警在这个宇宙中真的存在吗？我们被告知这是一个非常黑暗的漫威宇宙版本，变种人受到猎杀，大多数普通民众甚至不知道他们的存在。这似乎表明X教授和他的团队并没有在外面为人类与变种人的和平共处而奔走。值得注意的是，琴在这里甚至没有穿传统的X战警制服。

paragraphs.en: Does this mean Wolverine and Jean Grey are free agents rather than team players? What exactly is their history together? These are questions we’re very interested to see the game explore.
paragraphs.cn: 这是否意味着金刚狼和琴·格雷是自由行动者而非团队合作者？他们之间究竟有着怎样的历史？这些都是我们非常期待游戏去探索的问题。

paragraphs.en: The sizzle reel shows a ninja wearing a demonic mask. This is almost certainly Ogun, a character who shares a long history with Wolverine. They originally met in WWII, and Ogun was Wolverine’s sensei for a time.
paragraphs.cn: 精彩集锦中展示了一个戴着恶魔面具的忍者。这几乎可以肯定是奥贡，一个与金刚狼有着悠久历史的角色。他们最初在二战中相遇，奥贡曾一度是金刚狼的导师。

paragraphs.en: However, in modern times, the two are bitter enemies. Ogun used his ability to possess others to hijack Kitty Pryde’s body, at least until she resisted his influence and Wolverine killed his old friend. But, this being the Marvel Universe, it wasn’t long before Ogun returned.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，在现代，两人成了死敌。奥贡利用他附身他人的能力劫持了凯蒂·普莱德的身体，直到她抵抗了他的影响，金刚狼杀死了他的老朋友。但，这是漫威宇宙，没过多久奥贡就回来了。

paragraphs.en: We’re not sure what role Ogun will play in the game. Is he part of a flashback storyline, or will he appear in the present? And is he the leader of the red ninjas we see in the sizzle reel? Perhaps the game will depict Ogun as the leader of The Hand or another ninja cult, making them one more faction of enemies Logan has to fight.
paragraphs.cn: 我们不确定奥贡将在游戏中扮演什么角色。他是闪回故事线的一部分，还是会在现在出现？他是我们在精彩集锦中看到的红衣忍者的领袖吗？也许游戏会将奥贡描绘成手合会或其他忍者邪教的领袖，使他们成为罗根必须对抗的又一个敌对派系。

paragraphs.en: We briefly see Mystique in the sizzle reel. This is another villain whose history with Logan goes back decades. As a mutant shape-shifter, Mystique is, like Wolverine, functionally immortal, and the two have clashed many times over the years.
paragraphs.cn: 我们在精彩集锦中短暂地看到了魔形女。这是另一个与罗根有着数十年恩怨的反派。作为一个变种人变形者，魔形女和金刚狼一样，实际上是不朽的，两人多年来多次发生冲突。

paragraphs.en: That said, it doesn’t necessarily appear that Mystique is a villain in this game. We see her battling a Reaver, suggesting that she’s joining the fight to stop whatever it is these mercenaries and Trask Industries are up to. Could she be trying to protect her lover, Destiny, or her son, Nightcrawler?
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，魔形女在这款游戏中似乎不一定是反派。我们看到她正在与一个掠夺者战斗，这表明她加入了战斗，以阻止这些雇佣兵和Trask Industries的阴谋。她是在试图保护她的爱人命运女，还是她的儿子夜行者？

paragraphs.en: One villain we know will be directly clashing with Wolverine in the game is Omega Red. Once a man named Arkady Rossovich, he was subjected to brutal experiments designed to create the Soviet Union’s answer to Captain America. That ordeal gave him increased strength and durability, as well as a pair of flexible carbonadium tendrils that can drain the life force of his enemies.
paragraphs.cn: 我们知道的一个将直接与金刚狼在游戏中交锋的反派是红坦克。他曾是一个名叫阿卡迪·罗索维奇的人，被用于进行旨在创造苏联版美国队长的残酷实验。那次磨难赋予了他增强的力量和耐力，以及一对灵活的碳合金触须，可以吸取敌人的生命力。

paragraphs.en: Omega Red’s rivalry with Wolverine goes back well before Logan’s time with the X-Men. They originally clashed when Logan was a member of the strike force Team X. Wolverine has since learned the hard way that Omega Red is a very hard man to kill.
paragraphs.cn: 红坦克与金刚狼的恩怨早在罗根加入X战警之前就开始了。他们最初在罗根是X小队成员时发生冲突。金刚狼此后通过惨痛的经历认识到，红坦克是一个非常难以杀死的人。

paragraphs.en: What would a Wolverine game be without an appearance by Sabretooth? Logan may have many foes, but only Sabretooth can claim the distinction of being his arch-nemesis.
paragraphs.cn: 一款金刚狼游戏怎么能没有剑齿虎的出现呢？罗根可能有很多敌人，但只有剑齿虎能称得上是他的宿敌。

paragraphs.en: Sabretooth is basically a bigger, meaner, stronger version of Wolverine himself. He has great strength and similarly enhanced senses and boosted healing. Depending on which origin story you choose to follow, Logan and Victor Creed are either long-lost brothers, father and son, or simply members of the same, feral subspecies of mutant.
paragraphs.cn: 剑齿虎基本上是一个更大、更凶残、更强壮的金刚狼版本。他拥有强大的力量，同样增强的感官和加速的自愈能力。根据你选择遵循的起源故事，罗根和维克多·克里德要么是失散多年的兄弟，要么是父子，或者只是同一野蛮变种人亚种的成员。

paragraphs.en: Whatever is going on in Marvel’s Wolverine, expect Sabretooth to be at the center of the conflict. But don’t necessarily expect him to be the final boss. It turns out that he’s actually fighting alongside Logan in the game. However much these two may hate each other, they seem to have a common goal.
paragraphs.cn: 无论《漫威金刚狼》的剧情如何，剑齿虎都将是冲突的核心。但不要指望他一定是最终Boss。事实证明，他在游戏中实际上是与罗根并肩作战的。无论这两人多么憎恨对方，他们似乎有一个共同的目标。

paragraphs.en: Which X-Men character are you most excited to see in Marvel’s Wolverine? Let us know in the comments.
paragraphs.cn: 你最期待在《漫威金刚狼》中看到哪个X战警角色？在评论中告诉我们吧。

paragraphs.en: For more, find out where to order Marvel’s Wolverine and see everything announced at the State of Play .
paragraphs.cn: 了解更多信息，请查看《漫威金刚狼》的预购渠道，并了解State of Play上公布的所有内容。

translated_terms.Jedi: Fallen Order: 《星球大战绝地：陨落的武士团》
